overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character in a long coat walking along a wet city sidewalk at night. The character approaches and enters a modern commercial building with illuminated signage, while another pedestrian walks nearby. The scene features realistic wet pavement reflections and urban nighttime lighting typical of open-world games.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character walking along a wet city sidewalk at night, following a building facade. A pedestrian walks ahead on the right, while traffic moves along the road to the left. Street lamps and a decorative banner illuminate the scene with mixed warm and cool lighting.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a modern building entrance with prominent illuminated signage. The environment becomes more enclosed as the character moves under the building overhang toward the glass doors. The other pedestrian moves toward a side entrance while the camera follows the main character into the brightly lit interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked urban sidewalk into the brightly lit interior of a modern commercial building. It begins by trailing a character in a long coat walking along a building facade, where street lamps and decorative banners cast mixed warm and cool light across the wet pavement. As the character advances, the open city street with its passing traffic and a nearby pedestrian gradually gives way to the more enclosed space of a building overhang. The scene then shifts toward a set of glass doors marked by prominent illuminated signage, following the character as they leave the nighttime street behind. Finally, the camera glides through the entrance, transitioning from the dark, reflective exterior into a vivid, brightly lit indoor environment.
